nodes.label: P2.5 synth — per-block separability, write actually holds higher than read
nodes.rationale: write per-block probe rises quickly to ~0.89 and stays flat across blocks 2-8; read per-block probe rises more slowly to ~0.76-0.79 -- on synth the GD-realigned (write) stream is actually MORE class-aligned per block than raw SCFF (read), the opposite pattern from CIFAR, though this does not translate into a final-accuracy win for write (see BLOCK figure).
